package_title: I will deploy a 24/7 AI voice receptionist for your plumbing business
description:
🔧 I will deploy a 24/7 AI voice receptionist for your plumbing business

I deploy an AI voice agent that answers calls, books jobs, and texts you the details — so you stop losing the 27% of calls owners miss using Piper (local TTS) + Whisper (local STT) + Hermes/OpenClaw + Chatwoot + n8n — all free/self-hosted.

✅ What you get:
• Done-for-you setup — no technical skills needed
• 100% free, open-source tools (you own it, no SaaS lock-in)
• Charge $900–$1,800 setup + $299–$599/mo; your inference cost ~$0 (local) to <$5/mo
• 7-day support after go-live

📦 Packages:
• Basic ($300, 3 days, 1 rev): Single-line agent, 1 script, Email support
• Standard ($1200, 5 days, 2 rev): Full voice agent, Booking/CRM hook, Loom walkthrough, 7-day support
• Premium ($2400, 7 days, 3 rev): Multi-line + escalation, Unlimited scripts, Monthly retainer option, Priority support

🚀 How it works:
1. You tell me your call flow + tools (form on order)
2. I build, test, and voice-train the agent
3. I hand over + record a 5-min Loom walkthrough

⚡ Why me: I use the same free-tool stack that powers a 100-skill autonomous company.

n8n_workflow.name: deliver-voice-agent-plumbing
n8n_workflow.note: Tools: Piper (local TTS) + Whisper (local STT) + Hermes/OpenClaw + Chatwoot + n8n — all free/self-hosted. Replace code nodes with your STT/LLM/TTS logic.
